item.title: Utrecht, the Netherlands
item.description: Utrecht, the Netherlands It is being viewed as the **correction of a historic mistake.** More than 40 years after parts of the canal that encircled Utrecht’s old town were concreted over to accommodate a 12-lane motorway, the Dutch city celebrates restoration of its 900-year-old moat.
item.dc:creator: BlakeAndMortimer

item.title: When I see things that’ll help my sons, I post them in a shared album. Now I share them with you. If you disagree or feel differently, please move on and don’t bring the rest of us down. Please like if you do.
item.description:
#ILoveYou #relationship_advice this one is getting a lot of comments. Check out my recent Dune meme dump for related work content.
#ILoveYou #relationship_advice
#ILoveYou #relationship_advice
#anxiety
Integrity
Do it anyway. Be brave.
#ILoveYou #relationship_advice
#depression
Pavlov #CBT
#ILoveYou #relationship_advice
#ILoveYou #relationship_advice

Relationship advice
Relationship advice

Life advice
Anxiety

Success
Believe in yourself
Relationship advice
Easy has a cost
Relationship advice
Validity versus appropriateness
#ILoveYou
Relationship advice
Warmth
Productivity
Friends. Don’t try to do it all yourself.
Relationship advice
It’s okay. Integrity.
Rest is not a reward.
How to apologize.
Confort zone.
Listen to experience.
Touch grass. Sit in the sun.
Seriously. All the time.

item.title: These weren't just "oaks" - they were planted between larch and spruce so that they would grow tall and straight, which means the navy oak forests are rather unusual.

item.title: Water you waiting for? Dive into these bottom shelf memes
item.description:
@HileyNoteson Yoooooooooooooooooooooo
twitch.tv/bottomshelfvodka Saturdays & Sundays 9:30 - 11:30 p.m. CST Tuesdays - Thursdays 9:30 - 11:30 p.m. CST Follow our channel to be notified next time me, Frothy, and our favorite Imgurians from the Bottom Shelf Community go live!
Where sometimes we eat the world's hottest chocolate bar and try to read stream "Go The Fuck To Sleep"
Here's some relaxing hot dog photography from our last camping trip.
Ham tax. discord.gg/bottomshelfvodka Join for the games! Shit, man. We play everything...if there's a specific game you like, I guarantee you'll find a shitposting meme loving Imgurian there to play it with you. Join for the memes! Imgurians share memes in the meme dumpster 24/7 Join for the Awe! Pay your pet taxes in the pet tax channel Join for the NSFW memes! Join to chat with hilarious people! Join to lurk in the corners! Join for the meme challenges! Join for the shockingly magnificent balance of wholesomeness and chaos. Still unsure about joining the Bottom Shelf Community server? Check out our museum of stupidity. https://imgur.com/gallery/FYpqqAf
item.dc:creator: BottomShelfVodka

item.title: About to get a brain tumor removed (LGG) (4x4x4cm). A bit scared of chance of getting paralyzed or personality changes but let's hope for the best. Enjoy your health, it can happen to anyone as I'm only 24. Fu*ck you and see you tomorrow.

item.title: Jasmin Paris. First woman to finish the infamous Barkley Marathon.
item.description: One of five people finishing the marathon this year. She finished with only 99 seconds to spare.

item.title: The only German soldier ever to get a memorial made by Americans
item.description: Friedrich died at 23 to save the life of an American soldier badly wounded in a minefield in 1944. Friedrich told his men to cease fire and let the Americans come get him. But they never did, an hour went by, and he decided to go try save the American soldier. With a medic team behind. He got close, but stepped on a mine himself and died at the hospital later on. His country would shame him for this act of putting his life at danger for the enemy,but the Americans gave respect
item.dc:creator: sMarbleWrecker

item.title: Every morning and every night I send my two adult sons, their SOs, and my wife a batch of memes as an I love you. Dad jokes, words of affirmation, nightmare fuel, oddities, daily theme music. This is my latest batch. Like if you like. Don’t over analyze.
item.description:
Today’s morning theme music // morning jam. Get up! Go to school and/or work. Have a great day. I love you.
I love you. Goodnight.
#dad_jokes
Today’s morning theme music // morning jam. Get up! Go to school and/or work. Have a great day. I love you.
#dad_jokes
Today’s morning theme music // morning jam. Get up! Go to school and/or work. Have a great day. I love you.
#dad_jokes
Within the past nine months, my eldest son has been in two car crashes. His SO had their car hit in a hit in run while parked outside their house. My youngest son was hit in a moving hit and run. My youngest son’s SO rear ended an old lady within hours of me posting this meme. I hate to say it, but this sure gives credence to the actuarial scientists. Damn it. Kids are expensive.
Today’s morning theme music // morning jam. Get up! Go to school and/or work. Have a great day. I love you.
It's going to rain a lot tonight. Make sure you have your thunder buddy. Good night. I love you.
Today’s morning theme music // morning jam. Get up! Go to school and/or work. Have a great day. I love you.
#sweet_dreams
Use your head. #sweet_dreams.
Put it away, cat. We can give you rent money. Stay in school.
He’s all in.
#dad_jokes
Today’s morning theme music // morning jam. Get up! Go to school and/or work. Have a great day. I love you.
Words of affirmation.
Words of affirmation.
#dad_jokes
Today’s morning theme music // morning jam. Get up! Go to school and/or work. Have a great day. I love you.
#cat
#cat
Before you freak out on me like last time, a) I sent this on Wednesday, and b) it’s an omen of foreboding, so it works any day. I love you all. Have a great night. Sweet dreams.
#cat
Be gruntled today. I love you.
The Best cat meme on the Internet. #cat
101 Elmos. Technically not a #cat
#sweet_dreams I love you. Goodnight.
#dad_jokes
Don’t forget to eat. I love you. Have a great day.
Happiness is…wear a condom.
#sweet_dreams. I love you. Goodnight.
#shiny #shinypokemon
Have a great day. I love you. Don’t stare at the turtles. They’re watching.
Everyone say “Hi, Peanut!” Have a great day. I love you.
Do your best today. Even if you’re fat like me. Have a great day. I love you.
Study the classics today. I love you. Have a great day.
#gnomedepot #gnome
Time flies. Call your mother. #dad_jokes
#dad_jokes
I love you. Have a great day.
I love you. Have a great day.
item.dc:creator: Wheretheheckisjason
